concepts.label: Pi (π)
concepts.definition: Ratio of circumference to diameter, ≈3.14159265358979

concepts.label: Euler's Number (e)
concepts.definition: Base of natural logarithm, ≈2.71828182845905

concepts.label: Square Root of 2 (√2)
concepts.definition: Pythagoras' constant, ≈1.41421356237

concepts.label: Square Root of 3 (√3)
concepts.definition: Theodorus' constant, ≈1.73205080757

concepts.label: Euler-Mascheroni Constant (γ)
concepts.definition: Limit of harmonic series minus ln(n), ≈0.5772156649

concepts.label: Catalan's Constant (G)
concepts.definition: Sum of alternating series of inverse odd squares, ≈0.9159655941

concepts.label: Apéry's Constant (ζ(3))
concepts.definition: Value of Riemann zeta at 3, ≈1.2020569031

concepts.label: Khinchin's Constant (K)
concepts.definition: Geometric mean of continued fraction coefficients, ≈2.6854520010

concepts.label: Glaisher-Kinkelin Constant (A)
concepts.definition: Related to derivatives of zeta function, ≈1.2824271291

concepts.label: Omega Constant (Ω)
concepts.definition: Value satisfying Ωe^Ω=1, ≈0.5671432904

concepts.label: Plastic Number (ρ)
concepts.definition: Real root of x³=x+1, ≈1.3247179572

concepts.label: Feigenbaum Constant (δ)
concepts.definition: Universal ratio in period-doubling bifurcation, ≈4.6692016091

concepts.label: Feigenbaum Constant (α)
concepts.definition: Second Feigenbaum constant, ≈2.5029078750

concepts.label: Conway's Constant (λ)
concepts.definition: Growth rate of look-and-say sequence, ≈1.3035772690

concepts.label: Ramanujan-Soldner Constant (μ)
concepts.definition: Zero of logarithmic integral, ≈1.4513692349

concepts.label: Gauss's Constant (G)
concepts.definition: Reciprocal of AGM of 1 and √2, ≈0.8346268416

concepts.label: Viswanath's Constant
concepts.definition: Growth rate of random Fibonacci sequences, ≈1.1319882488

concepts.label: Mills' Constant (A)
concepts.definition: Smallest A such that floor(A^(3^n)) is prime, ≈1.3063778839

concepts.label: Twin Prime Constant (C₂)
concepts.definition: Product over primes of 1-1/(p-1)², ≈0.6601618158

concepts.label: Reciprocal Fibonacci Constant (ψ)
concepts.definition: Sum of reciprocals of Fibonacci numbers, ≈3.3598856662

concepts.label: Erdős-Borwein Constant (E)
concepts.definition: Sum of reciprocals of Mersenne numbers, ≈1.6066951524

concepts.label: Laplace Limit (ε)
concepts.definition: Maximum eccentricity for convergence in Kepler's equation, ≈0.6627434193

concepts.label: Dottie Number
concepts.definition: Fixed point of cosine function, ≈0.7390851332

concepts.label: Supergolden Ratio (ψ)
concepts.definition: Real root of x³=x²+1, ≈1.4655712319

concepts.label: Wallis Product
concepts.definition: Product formula for π/2

concepts.label: Imaginary Unit (i)
concepts.definition: Square root of -1, i²=-1

concepts.label: Infinity (∞)
concepts.definition: Concept representing unboundedness

concepts.label: Natural Number
concepts.definition: Counting numbers: 0,1,2,3,...

concepts.label: Integer
concepts.definition: Whole numbers including negatives: ...,-2,-1,0,1,2,...

concepts.label: Rational Number
concepts.definition: Number expressible as p/q where p,q are integers and q≠0

concepts.label: Irrational Number
concepts.definition: Real number not expressible as a ratio of integers

concepts.label: Real Number
concepts.definition: Any number on the continuous number line

concepts.label: Complex Number
concepts.definition: Number of form a+bi where a,b are real and i²=-1

concepts.label: Prime Number
concepts.definition: Natural number >1 divisible only by 1 and itself

concepts.label: Composite Number
concepts.definition: Natural number >1 that is not prime

concepts.label: Even Number
concepts.definition: Integer divisible by 2

concepts.label: Odd Number
concepts.definition: Integer not divisible by 2

concepts.label: Transcendental Number
concepts.definition: Real or complex number not algebraic over the rationals

concepts.label: Algebraic Number
concepts.definition: Root of a non-zero polynomial with rational coefficients

concepts.label: Perfect Number
concepts.definition: Number equal to sum of its proper divisors

concepts.label: Abundant Number
concepts.definition: Number less than sum of its proper divisors

concepts.label: Deficient Number
concepts.definition: Number greater than sum of its proper divisors

concepts.label: Amicable Numbers
concepts.definition: Pair where each is the sum of proper divisors of the other

concepts.label: Fibonacci Number
concepts.definition: Member of sequence where each is sum of two preceding: 0,1,1,2,3,5,8,...

concepts.label: Lucas Number
concepts.definition: Similar to Fibonacci starting 2,1,3,4,7,11,...

concepts.label: Mersenne Prime
concepts.definition: Prime of the form 2^p - 1

concepts.label: Fermat Number
concepts.definition: Number of form 2^(2^n)+1

concepts.label: Carmichael Number
concepts.definition: Composite number satisfying Fermat's little theorem for all bases

concepts.label: Catalan Number
concepts.definition: C(n)=C(2n,n)/(n+1), counts many combinatorial structures

concepts.label: Bell Number
concepts.definition: Counts partitions of a set

concepts.label: Bernoulli Number
concepts.definition: Sequence appearing in Taylor series of tan, and Euler-Maclaurin formula

concepts.label: Stirling Number
concepts.definition: Counts partitions of sets into subsets or permutations into cycles

concepts.label: Triangular Number
concepts.definition: n(n+1)/2 — sum of first n natural numbers

concepts.label: Square Number
concepts.definition: n² — perfect square

concepts.label: Figurate Number
concepts.definition: Number that can be represented as a geometric arrangement of points

concepts.label: Gaussian Integer
concepts.definition: Complex number a+bi where a,b are integers

concepts.label: Eisenstein Integer
concepts.definition: Complex number a+bω where ω=e^(2πi/3)

concepts.label: p-adic Number
concepts.definition: Number in completion of rationals with respect to p-adic norm

concepts.label: Surreal Number
concepts.definition: Number system including reals, infinitesimals, and transfinites

concepts.label: Hyperreal Number
concepts.definition: Extension of reals including infinitesimals and infinite numbers

concepts.label: Ordinal Number
concepts.definition: Generalization of natural numbers for ordering

concepts.label: Cardinal Number
concepts.definition: Measure of the size of a set

concepts.label: Quaternion
concepts.definition: Extension of complex numbers: a+bi+cj+dk

concepts.label: Octonion
concepts.definition: 8-dimensional normed division algebra

concepts.label: Sedenion
concepts.definition: 16-dimensional hypercomplex number system

concepts.label: Constructible Number
concepts.definition: Length constructible by compass and straightedge

concepts.label: Computable Number
concepts.definition: Real number computable by a Turing machine to arbitrary precision

concepts.label: Normal Number
concepts.definition: Number whose digits are uniformly distributed in every base

concepts.label: Liouville Number
concepts.definition: Transcendental number with very close rational approximations

concepts.label: Smith Number
concepts.definition: Composite where digit sum equals sum of digit sums of prime factors

concepts.label: Happy Number
concepts.definition: Number reaching 1 under repeated sum-of-squares-of-digits

concepts.label: Narcissistic Number
concepts.definition: n-digit number equal to sum of nth powers of its digits

concepts.label: Harshad Number
concepts.definition: Number divisible by its digit sum

concepts.label: Kaprekar Number
concepts.definition: Number whose square splits into two parts summing to the original

concepts.label: Semiprime
concepts.definition: Product of exactly two primes

concepts.label: Highly Composite Number
concepts.definition: Number with more divisors than any smaller positive integer

concepts.label: Smooth Number
concepts.definition: Number whose prime factors are all small

concepts.label: Powerful Number
concepts.definition: Number where every prime factor appears with exponent ≥2

concepts.label: Sociable Numbers
concepts.definition: Generalization of amicable numbers forming a cycle of aliquot sums

concepts.label: Vampire Number
concepts.definition: Number with an even number of digits formed by multiplying its fangs

concepts.label: Palindromic Number
concepts.definition: Number that reads the same forwards and backwards

concepts.label: Repunit
concepts.definition: Number consisting entirely of 1s: (10^n-1)/9

concepts.label: Wieferich Prime
concepts.definition: Prime p where p²|2^(p-1)-1

concepts.label: Sophie Germain Prime
concepts.definition: Prime p where 2p+1 is also prime

concepts.label: Twin Primes
concepts.definition: Pair of primes differing by 2

concepts.label: Cousin Primes
concepts.definition: Pair of primes differing by 4

concepts.label: Sexy Primes
concepts.definition: Pair of primes differing by 6

concepts.label: Safe Prime
concepts.definition: Prime of the form 2p+1 where p is also prime

concepts.label: Chen Prime
concepts.definition: Prime p where p+2 is prime or semiprime

concepts.label: Woodall Number
concepts.definition: Number of form n·2^n−1

concepts.label: Cullen Number
concepts.definition: Number of form n·2^n+1

concepts.label: Point
concepts.definition: Zero-dimensional geometric object, a location in space

concepts.label: Line
concepts.definition: One-dimensional infinite straight path

concepts.label: Line Segment
concepts.definition: Portion of a line bounded by two endpoints

concepts.label: Ray
concepts.definition: Portion of a line starting at one point extending infinitely

concepts.label: Triangle
concepts.definition: Three-sided polygon

concepts.label: Equilateral Triangle
concepts.definition: Triangle with all sides equal and all angles 60°

concepts.label: Isosceles Triangle
concepts.definition: Triangle with at least two equal sides

concepts.label: Scalene Triangle
concepts.definition: Triangle with all sides of different lengths

concepts.label: Right Triangle
concepts.definition: Triangle with one 90° angle

concepts.label: Obtuse Triangle
concepts.definition: Triangle with one angle >90°

concepts.label: Acute Triangle
concepts.definition: Triangle with all angles <90°

concepts.label: Square
concepts.definition: Regular quadrilateral with four equal sides and right angles

concepts.label: Rectangle
concepts.definition: Quadrilateral with four right angles

concepts.label: Rhombus
concepts.definition: Quadrilateral with four equal sides

concepts.label: Parallelogram
concepts.definition: Quadrilateral with two pairs of parallel sides

concepts.label: Trapezoid
concepts.definition: Quadrilateral with exactly one pair of parallel sides

concepts.label: Kite
concepts.definition: Quadrilateral with two pairs of adjacent equal sides

concepts.label: Pentagon
concepts.definition: Five-sided polygon

concepts.label: Regular Pentagon
concepts.definition: Pentagon with all sides and angles equal

concepts.label: Hexagon
concepts.definition: Six-sided polygon

concepts.label: Regular Hexagon
concepts.definition: Hexagon with all sides and angles equal

concepts.label: Heptagon
concepts.definition: Seven-sided polygon

concepts.label: Octagon
concepts.definition: Eight-sided polygon

concepts.label: Nonagon
concepts.definition: Nine-sided polygon

concepts.label: Decagon
concepts.definition: Ten-sided polygon

concepts.label: Hendecagon
concepts.definition: Eleven-sided polygon

concepts.label: Dodecagon
concepts.definition: Twelve-sided polygon

concepts.label: Icosagon
concepts.definition: Twenty-sided polygon

concepts.label: Circle
concepts.definition: Set of points equidistant from a center point

concepts.label: Ellipse
concepts.definition: Set of points where sum of distances to two foci is constant

concepts.label: Parabola
concepts.definition: Conic section, set of points equidistant from focus and directrix

concepts.label: Hyperbola
concepts.definition: Conic section, set of points where difference of distances to foci is constant

concepts.label: Annulus
concepts.definition: Region between two concentric circles

concepts.label: Sector
concepts.definition: Region enclosed by two radii and an arc

concepts.label: Segment (Circle)
concepts.definition: Region between a chord and its arc

concepts.label: Lune
concepts.definition: Crescent-shaped figure bounded by two circular arcs

concepts.label: Cardioid
concepts.definition: Heart-shaped curve, r=a(1+cosθ)

concepts.label: Limaçon
concepts.definition: Curve r=a+b·cosθ, generalization of cardioid

concepts.label: Lemniscate
concepts.definition: Figure-eight curve, r²=a²cos(2θ)

concepts.label: Astroid
concepts.definition: Hypocycloid with four cusps

concepts.label: Deltoid
concepts.definition: Hypocycloid with three cusps

concepts.label: Spirograph Curve
concepts.definition: Roulette curve traced by a point on a circle rolling inside another

concepts.label: Archimedean Spiral
concepts.definition: Spiral with constant separation r=a+bθ

concepts.label: Logarithmic Spiral
concepts.definition: Spiral with r=ae^(bθ), self-similar

concepts.label: Reuleaux Triangle
concepts.definition: Curve of constant width based on equilateral triangle

concepts.label: Koch Snowflake
concepts.definition: Fractal curve built by recursive triangle additions

concepts.label: Sierpinski Triangle
concepts.definition: Fractal subdividing equilateral triangle recursively

concepts.label: Mandelbrot Set
concepts.definition: Set of complex c for which z²+c iteration remains bounded

concepts.label: Julia Set
concepts.definition: Set of points with bounded iteration for fixed c in z²+c

concepts.label: Sphere
concepts.definition: Set of points equidistant from center in 3D, V=4πr³/3

concepts.label: Cube
concepts.definition: Regular hexahedron, six square faces

concepts.label: Cuboid
concepts.definition: Rectangular parallelepiped, six rectangular faces

concepts.label: Tetrahedron
concepts.definition: Polyhedron with four triangular faces

concepts.label: Regular Tetrahedron
concepts.definition: Tetrahedron with all faces equilateral triangles

concepts.label: Octahedron
concepts.definition: Polyhedron with eight equilateral triangular faces

concepts.label: Dodecahedron
concepts.definition: Polyhedron with twelve regular pentagonal faces

concepts.label: Icosahedron
concepts.definition: Polyhedron with twenty equilateral triangular faces

concepts.label: Cylinder
concepts.definition: Surface formed by points at fixed distance from a line segment

concepts.label: Cone
concepts.definition: Surface formed by lines from a point to a circle

concepts.label: Torus
concepts.definition: Doughnut-shaped surface of revolution

concepts.label: Ellipsoid
concepts.definition: Surface where all cross-sections are ellipses

concepts.label: Paraboloid
concepts.definition: Surface generated by rotating a parabola

concepts.label: Hyperboloid
concepts.definition: Surface generated by rotating a hyperbola

concepts.label: Prism
concepts.definition: Polyhedron with two parallel congruent polygonal bases

concepts.label: Triangular Prism
concepts.definition: Prism with triangular bases

concepts.label: Hexagonal Prism
concepts.definition: Prism with hexagonal bases

concepts.label: Pyramid
concepts.definition: Polyhedron with polygonal base and triangular sides meeting at apex

concepts.label: Square Pyramid
concepts.definition: Pyramid with square base

concepts.label: Frustum
concepts.definition: Portion of cone or pyramid between two parallel cutting planes

concepts.label: Truncated Cube
concepts.definition: Archimedean solid from truncating cube vertices

concepts.label: Truncated Octahedron
concepts.definition: Archimedean solid, space-filling, 14 faces

concepts.label: Truncated Icosahedron
concepts.definition: Soccer ball shape, 32 faces (12 pentagons, 20 hexagons)

concepts.label: Cuboctahedron
concepts.definition: Archimedean solid with 8 triangles and 6 squares

concepts.label: Rhombicuboctahedron
concepts.definition: Archimedean solid with 26 faces

concepts.label: Snub Cube
concepts.definition: Chiral Archimedean solid with 38 faces

concepts.label: Rhombicosidodecahedron
concepts.definition: Archimedean solid with 62 faces

concepts.label: Great Stellated Dodecahedron
concepts.definition: Kepler-Poinsot polyhedron

concepts.label: Small Stellated Dodecahedron
concepts.definition: Kepler-Poinsot polyhedron

concepts.label: Klein Bottle
concepts.definition: Non-orientable surface with no boundary

concepts.label: Möbius Strip
concepts.definition: Non-orientable surface with one side and one boundary

concepts.label: Cross-Cap
concepts.definition: Non-orientable surface representation of projective plane

concepts.label: Tesseract
concepts.definition: Four-dimensional hypercube

concepts.label: Steinmetz Solid
concepts.definition: Intersection of two or three perpendicular cylinders

concepts.label: Oloid
concepts.definition: Convex hull of two perpendicular circles sharing centers

concepts.label: Sphericon
concepts.definition: Solid of constant width formed from a bicone

concepts.label: Sine (sin)
concepts.definition: Ratio of opposite to hypotenuse; sin(θ)=opp/hyp

concepts.label: Cosine (cos)
concepts.definition: Ratio of adjacent to hypotenuse; cos(θ)=adj/hyp

concepts.label: Tangent (tan)
concepts.definition: Ratio of opposite to adjacent; tan(θ)=sin(θ)/cos(θ)

concepts.label: Cosecant (csc)
concepts.definition: Reciprocal of sine; csc(θ)=1/sin(θ)

concepts.label: Secant (sec)
concepts.definition: Reciprocal of cosine; sec(θ)=1/cos(θ)

concepts.label: Cotangent (cot)
concepts.definition: Reciprocal of tangent; cot(θ)=cos(θ)/sin(θ)

concepts.label: Inverse Sine (arcsin)
concepts.definition: Inverse of sine, returns angle from ratio

concepts.label: Inverse Cosine (arccos)
concepts.definition: Inverse of cosine, returns angle from ratio

concepts.label: Inverse Tangent (arctan)
concepts.definition: Inverse of tangent, returns angle from ratio

concepts.label: Inverse Cosecant (arccsc)
concepts.definition: Inverse of cosecant

concepts.label: Inverse Secant (arcsec)
concepts.definition: Inverse of secant

concepts.label: Inverse Cotangent (arccot)
concepts.definition: Inverse of cotangent

concepts.label: Hyperbolic Sine (sinh)
concepts.definition: sinh(x)=(e^x−e^(−x))/2

concepts.label: Hyperbolic Cosine (cosh)
concepts.definition: cosh(x)=(e^x+e^(−x))/2

concepts.label: Hyperbolic Tangent (tanh)
concepts.definition: tanh(x)=sinh(x)/cosh(x)

concepts.label: Hyperbolic Cosecant (csch)
concepts.definition: csch(x)=1/sinh(x)

concepts.label: Hyperbolic Secant (sech)
concepts.definition: sech(x)=1/cosh(x)

concepts.label: Hyperbolic Cotangent (coth)
concepts.definition: coth(x)=cosh(x)/sinh(x)

concepts.label: Inverse Hyperbolic Sine (arsinh)
concepts.definition: arsinh(x)=ln(x+√(x²+1))

concepts.label: Inverse Hyperbolic Cosine (arcosh)
concepts.definition: arcosh(x)=ln(x+√(x²−1))

concepts.label: Inverse Hyperbolic Tangent (artanh)
concepts.definition: artanh(x)=½ln((1+x)/(1−x))

concepts.label: Pythagorean Identity
concepts.definition: sin²θ+cos²θ=1

concepts.label: Double Angle Formula (sin)
concepts.definition: sin(2θ)=2sin(θ)cos(θ)

concepts.label: Double Angle Formula (cos)
concepts.definition: cos(2θ)=cos²θ−sin²θ

concepts.label: Sum-to-Product Identity
concepts.definition: sinA+sinB=2sin((A+B)/2)cos((A−B)/2)

concepts.label: Product-to-Sum Identity
concepts.definition: sinAcosB=½[sin(A+B)+sin(A−B)]

concepts.label: Law of Sines
concepts.definition: a/sinA=b/sinB=c/sinC=2R

concepts.label: Law of Cosines
concepts.definition: c²=a²+b²−2ab·cosC

concepts.label: Euler's Formula
concepts.definition: e^(iθ)=cosθ+i·sinθ

concepts.label: De Moivre's Theorem
concepts.definition: (cosθ+i·sinθ)^n=cos(nθ)+i·sin(nθ)

concepts.label: Radian
concepts.definition: Angle measure: 2π radians = 360°

concepts.label: Unit Circle
concepts.definition: Circle of radius 1 centered at origin used to define trig functions

concepts.label: Amplitude
concepts.definition: Maximum displacement of a periodic function from equilibrium

concepts.label: Period
concepts.definition: Smallest positive T such that f(x+T)=f(x)

concepts.label: Phase Shift
concepts.definition: Horizontal translation of a periodic function

concepts.label: Sinc Function
concepts.definition: sinc(x)=sin(πx)/(πx), with sinc(0)=1

concepts.label: Versine
concepts.definition: vers(θ)=1−cos(θ)

concepts.label: Haversine
concepts.definition: hav(θ)=(1−cosθ)/2, used in navigation

concepts.label: Exsecant
concepts.definition: exsec(θ)=sec(θ)−1

concepts.label: Limit
concepts.definition: Value a function approaches as input approaches a point

concepts.label: Continuity
concepts.definition: Function is continuous at a if lim(x→a)f(x)=f(a)

concepts.label: Derivative
concepts.definition: Rate of change; f'(x)=lim(h→0)[f(x+h)−f(x)]/h

concepts.label: Partial Derivative
concepts.definition: Derivative with respect to one variable holding others constant

concepts.label: Directional Derivative
concepts.definition: Rate of change in a specified direction

concepts.label: Gradient
concepts.definition: Vector of all partial derivatives, ∇f

concepts.label: Divergence
concepts.definition: Scalar measure of vector field's source/sink strength, ∇·F

concepts.label: Curl
concepts.definition: Vector measure of rotation in a vector field, ∇×F

concepts.label: Laplacian
concepts.definition: Divergence of gradient, ∇²f

concepts.label: Jacobian
concepts.definition: Matrix of all first-order partial derivatives

concepts.label: Hessian
concepts.definition: Matrix of second-order partial derivatives

concepts.label: Product Rule
concepts.definition: d/dx[f·g]=f'g+fg'

concepts.label: Quotient Rule
concepts.definition: d/dx[f/g]=(f'g−fg')/g²

concepts.label: Power Rule
concepts.definition: d/dx[x^n]=nx^(n−1)

concepts.label: L'Hôpital's Rule
concepts.definition: lim f/g = lim f'/g' for indeterminate forms

concepts.label: Mean Value Theorem
concepts.definition: f'(c)=(f(b)−f(a))/(b−a) for some c in (a,b)

concepts.label: Rolle's Theorem
concepts.definition: If f(a)=f(b), then f'(c)=0 for some c in (a,b)

concepts.label: Intermediate Value Theorem
concepts.definition: Continuous f on [a,b] takes all values between f(a) and f(b)

concepts.label: Extreme Value Theorem
concepts.definition: Continuous f on [a,b] attains its max and min

concepts.label: Integral
concepts.definition: Accumulation of quantities; area under a curve

concepts.label: Definite Integral
concepts.definition: ∫[a,b]f(x)dx, the signed area under f from a to b

concepts.label: Indefinite Integral
concepts.definition: Antiderivative F(x)+C where F'(x)=f(x)

concepts.label: Riemann Integral
concepts.definition: Integral defined as limit of Riemann sums

concepts.label: Lebesgue Integral
concepts.definition: Integral based on measure theory, more general than Riemann

concepts.label: Improper Integral
concepts.definition: Integral with infinite limit or unbounded integrand

concepts.label: Fundamental Theorem of Calculus
concepts.definition: Links derivative and integral: ∫[a,b]f'(x)dx=f(b)−f(a)

concepts.label: Integration by Parts
concepts.definition: ∫u·dv=uv−∫v·du

concepts.label: Integration by Substitution
concepts.definition: ∫f(g(x))g'(x)dx=∫f(u)du where u=g(x)

concepts.label: Partial Fractions
concepts.definition: Decomposition of rational function for integration

concepts.label: Taylor Series
concepts.definition: f(x)=Σf^(n)(a)(x−a)^n/n!, infinite polynomial approximation

concepts.label: Maclaurin Series
concepts.definition: Taylor series centered at a=0

concepts.label: Laurent Series
concepts.definition: Generalization of Taylor series allowing negative powers

concepts.label: Power Series
concepts.definition: Σa_n(x−c)^n, infinite series in powers of (x−c)

concepts.label: Radius of Convergence
concepts.definition: R such that power series converges for |x−c|<R

concepts.label: Uniform Convergence
concepts.definition: Convergence where the rate is independent of x

concepts.label: Pointwise Convergence
concepts.definition: Convergence at each individual point

concepts.label: Fourier Series
concepts.definition: Representation of periodic function as sum of sines and cosines

concepts.label: Fourier Transform
concepts.definition: F(ω)=∫f(t)e^(−iωt)dt, frequency domain representation

concepts.label: Laplace Transform
concepts.definition: F(s)=∫₀^∞f(t)e^(−st)dt

concepts.label: Z-Transform
concepts.definition: Discrete-time analog of Laplace transform

concepts.label: Differential Equation
concepts.definition: Equation involving derivatives of unknown function

concepts.label: Ordinary Differential Equation
concepts.definition: DE with one independent variable

concepts.label: Partial Differential Equation
concepts.definition: DE with multiple independent variables

concepts.label: Separable Equation
concepts.definition: ODE where variables can be separated: g(y)dy=f(x)dx

concepts.label: Linear ODE
concepts.definition: ODE where the unknown and its derivatives appear linearly

concepts.label: Bernoulli Equation
concepts.definition: y'+P(x)y=Q(x)y^n, solvable by substitution

concepts.label: Exact Equation
concepts.definition: M(x,y)dx+N(x,y)dy=0 where ∂M/∂y=∂N/∂x

concepts.label: Cauchy-Euler Equation
concepts.definition: ax²y''+bxy'+cy=0

concepts.label: Heat Equation
concepts.definition: ∂u/∂t=α∇²u, models heat diffusion

concepts.label: Wave Equation
concepts.definition: ∂²u/∂t²=c²∇²u, models wave propagation

concepts.label: Laplace's Equation
concepts.definition: ∇²u=0, harmonic functions

concepts.label: Poisson's Equation
concepts.definition: ∇²u=f, generalization of Laplace's equation

concepts.label: Navier-Stokes Equation
concepts.definition: PDE governing fluid motion, millennium problem

concepts.label: Multiple Integral
concepts.definition: Integration over regions in ℝⁿ

concepts.label: Double Integral
concepts.definition: ∫∫f(x,y)dA, integral over 2D region

concepts.label: Triple Integral
concepts.definition: ∫∫∫f(x,y,z)dV, integral over 3D region

concepts.label: Line Integral
concepts.definition: Integral of function along a curve

concepts.label: Surface Integral
concepts.definition: Integral of function over a surface

concepts.label: Green's Theorem
concepts.definition: Relates line integral around closed curve to double integral

concepts.label: Stokes' Theorem

concepts.label: Divergence Theorem
concepts.definition: Relates flux through surface to volume integral of divergence

concepts.label: Curvature
concepts.definition: Rate of change of tangent direction, κ=|dT/ds|

concepts.label: Parametric Equations
concepts.definition: Representation of curve via parameter: x=f(t), y=g(t)

concepts.label: Polar Coordinates
concepts.definition: Representation using (r,θ) instead of (x,y)

concepts.label: Cylindrical Coordinates
concepts.definition: Extension of polar with z: (r,θ,z)

concepts.label: Spherical Coordinates
concepts.definition: 3D coordinates (ρ,θ,φ)

concepts.label: Epsilon-Delta Definition
concepts.definition: Rigorous definition of limit using ε and δ

concepts.label: Squeeze Theorem
concepts.definition: If g(x)≤f(x)≤h(x) and lim g=lim h=L, then lim f=L

concepts.label: Implicit Differentiation
concepts.definition: Finding dy/dx from implicitly defined functions

concepts.label: Logarithmic Differentiation
concepts.definition: Taking ln of both sides before differentiating

concepts.label: Newton's Method
concepts.definition: Iterative root-finding: x_{n+1}=x_n−f(x_n)/f'(x_n)

concepts.label: Euler's Method
concepts.definition: Numerical ODE solver: y_{n+1}=y_n+hf(x_n,y_n)

concepts.label: Runge-Kutta Method
concepts.definition: Fourth-order numerical ODE integration method

concepts.label: Simpson's Rule
concepts.definition: Numerical integration using parabolic approximation

concepts.label: Trapezoidal Rule
concepts.definition: Numerical integration using trapezoids

concepts.label: Calculus of Variations
concepts.definition: Finding functions that optimize functionals

concepts.label: Euler-Lagrange Equation
concepts.definition: Necessary condition for extremal of a functional

concepts.label: Vector Calculus
concepts.definition: Calculus extended to vector-valued functions

concepts.label: Tensor Calculus
concepts.definition: Extension of calculus to tensor fields on manifolds

concepts.label: Stochastic Calculus
concepts.definition: Calculus for stochastic processes, Itô and Stratonovich integrals

concepts.label: Itô's Lemma
concepts.definition: Chain rule for stochastic calculus

concepts.label: Convolution
concepts.definition: (f*g)(t)=∫f(τ)g(t−τ)dτ

concepts.label: Vector
concepts.definition: Element of a vector space, has magnitude and direction

concepts.label: Matrix
concepts.definition: Rectangular array of numbers arranged in rows and columns

concepts.label: Vector Space
concepts.definition: Set with addition and scalar multiplication satisfying axioms

concepts.label: Subspace
concepts.definition: Subset of vector space that is itself a vector space

concepts.label: Linear Independence
concepts.definition: No vector in set is a linear combination of others

concepts.label: Basis
concepts.definition: Linearly independent spanning set of a vector space

concepts.label: Dimension
concepts.definition: Number of vectors in a basis of a vector space

concepts.label: Span
concepts.definition: Set of all linear combinations of given vectors

concepts.label: Linear Transformation
concepts.definition: Map T:V→W preserving addition and scalar multiplication

concepts.label: Kernel (Null Space)
concepts.definition: Set of vectors mapped to zero by a linear transformation

concepts.label: Image (Range)
concepts.definition: Set of all outputs of a linear transformation

concepts.label: Rank
concepts.definition: Dimension of image of a linear transformation

concepts.label: Nullity
concepts.definition: Dimension of kernel of a linear transformation

concepts.label: Rank-Nullity Theorem
concepts.definition: rank(T)+nullity(T)=dim(V)

concepts.label: Determinant
concepts.definition: Scalar value encoding volume scaling and orientation of a matrix

concepts.label: Trace
concepts.definition: Sum of diagonal elements of a square matrix

concepts.label: Transpose
concepts.definition: Matrix with rows and columns swapped, A^T

concepts.label: Inverse Matrix
concepts.definition: A⁻¹ such that AA⁻¹=I

concepts.label: Orthogonal Matrix
concepts.definition: Square matrix whose transpose equals its inverse

concepts.label: Unitary Matrix
concepts.definition: Complex matrix whose conjugate transpose equals its inverse

concepts.label: Symmetric Matrix
concepts.definition: Matrix equal to its transpose, A=A^T

concepts.label: Hermitian Matrix
concepts.definition: Complex matrix equal to its conjugate transpose

concepts.label: Skew-Symmetric Matrix
concepts.definition: A^T=−A

concepts.label: Positive Definite Matrix
concepts.definition: Symmetric matrix with all positive eigenvalues

concepts.label: Eigenvalue
concepts.definition: Scalar λ where Av=λv for some nonzero v

concepts.label: Eigenvector
concepts.definition: Nonzero vector v where Av=λv

concepts.label: Characteristic Polynomial
concepts.definition: det(A−λI)=0, roots are eigenvalues

concepts.label: Diagonalization
concepts.definition: A=PDP⁻¹ where D is diagonal of eigenvalues

concepts.label: Spectral Theorem
concepts.definition: Symmetric matrices are orthogonally diagonalizable

concepts.label: Singular Value Decomposition
concepts.definition: A=UΣV^T, factorization into orthogonal and diagonal

concepts.label: QR Decomposition
concepts.definition: A=QR where Q is orthogonal, R is upper triangular

concepts.label: LU Decomposition
concepts.definition: A=LU where L is lower triangular, U is upper triangular

concepts.label: Cholesky Decomposition
concepts.definition: A=LL^T for positive definite A

concepts.label: Jordan Normal Form
concepts.definition: Canonical form of matrix up to similarity

concepts.label: Inner Product
concepts.definition: Generalization of dot product on a vector space

concepts.label: Dot Product
concepts.definition: a·b=Σaᵢbᵢ=|a||b|cosθ

concepts.label: Cross Product
concepts.definition: a×b, vector perpendicular to both a and b in ℝ³

concepts.label: Norm
concepts.definition: Function measuring size/length of a vector

concepts.label: Orthogonality
concepts.definition: Two vectors with inner product zero

concepts.label: Orthonormal Basis
concepts.definition: Basis of mutually orthogonal unit vectors

concepts.label: Gram-Schmidt Process
concepts.definition: Algorithm producing orthonormal basis from any basis

concepts.label: Projection
concepts.definition: Mapping vector onto a subspace

concepts.label: Least Squares
concepts.definition: Minimizing ||Ax−b||², solving overdetermined systems

concepts.label: Pseudoinverse
concepts.definition: Moore-Penrose generalized inverse A⁺

concepts.label: Tensor Product
concepts.definition: V⊗W, product of vector spaces

concepts.label: Dual Space
concepts.definition: Space of linear functionals on V

concepts.label: Cayley-Hamilton Theorem
concepts.definition: Every square matrix satisfies its characteristic polynomial

concepts.label: Perron-Frobenius Theorem
concepts.definition: Positive matrix has unique largest real eigenvalue

concepts.label: Gaussian Elimination
concepts.definition: Row reduction algorithm for solving linear systems

concepts.label: Cramer's Rule
concepts.definition: Solving linear systems using determinants

concepts.label: Matrix Exponential
concepts.definition: e^A=Σ(A^n/n!), solution to dx/dt=Ax

concepts.label: Normal Distribution
concepts.definition: Bell curve, f(x)=(1/σ√2π)e^(−(x−μ)²/2σ²)

concepts.label: Standard Normal Distribution
concepts.definition: Normal with μ=0, σ=1

concepts.label: Uniform Distribution (Continuous)
concepts.definition: Constant probability on [a,b], f(x)=1/(b−a)

concepts.label: Uniform Distribution (Discrete)
concepts.definition: Equal probability for each of n outcomes

concepts.label: Bernoulli Distribution
concepts.definition: Single trial with probability p of success

concepts.label: Binomial Distribution
concepts.definition: Number of successes in n independent Bernoulli trials

concepts.label: Poisson Distribution
concepts.definition: Number of events in fixed interval, P(k)=λ^k·e^(−λ)/k!

concepts.label: Geometric Distribution
concepts.definition: Number of trials until first success

concepts.label: Negative Binomial Distribution
concepts.definition: Number of trials until r-th success

concepts.label: Hypergeometric Distribution
concepts.definition: Successes in draws without replacement

concepts.label: Exponential Distribution
concepts.definition: Time between Poisson events, f(x)=λe^(−λx)

concepts.label: Gamma Distribution
concepts.definition: Generalization of exponential, sum of exponentials

concepts.label: Beta Distribution
concepts.definition: Distribution on [0,1], models proportions

concepts.label: Chi-Squared Distribution
concepts.definition: Sum of squared standard normals, χ²(k)

concepts.label: Student's t-Distribution
concepts.definition: Normal/√(χ²/k), heavy-tailed for small samples

concepts.label: F-Distribution
concepts.definition: Ratio of two chi-squared variables, used in ANOVA

concepts.label: Cauchy Distribution
concepts.definition: Heavy-tailed, no defined mean, f(x)=1/(π(1+x²))

concepts.label: Log-Normal Distribution
concepts.definition: Distribution of e^X where X is normal

concepts.label: Weibull Distribution
concepts.definition: Models failure times, f(x)=(k/λ)(x/λ)^(k−1)e^(−(x/λ)^k)

concepts.label: Pareto Distribution
concepts.definition: Power-law, models wealth/size, P(X>x)=(xₘ/x)^α

concepts.label: Rayleigh Distribution
concepts.definition: Distance of 2D Gaussian from origin

concepts.label: Maxwell-Boltzmann Distribution
concepts.definition: Speed distribution of gas molecules

concepts.label: Dirichlet Distribution
concepts.definition: Multivariate generalization of Beta distribution

concepts.label: Multinomial Distribution
concepts.definition: Generalization of binomial to multiple categories

concepts.label: Multivariate Normal Distribution
concepts.definition: Joint distribution of multiple normal variables

concepts.label: Wishart Distribution
concepts.definition: Distribution of sample covariance matrices

concepts.label: Inverse Wishart Distribution
concepts.definition: Conjugate prior for covariance matrices

concepts.label: Laplace Distribution
concepts.definition: Double exponential, f(x)=(1/2b)e^(−|x−μ|/b)

concepts.label: Logistic Distribution
concepts.definition: S-shaped CDF, similar to normal but heavier tails

concepts.label: Gumbel Distribution
concepts.definition: Extreme value distribution for maxima

concepts.label: Fréchet Distribution
concepts.definition: Extreme value distribution, heavy tail

concepts.label: Generalized Extreme Value Distribution
concepts.definition: Unifies Gumbel, Fréchet, Weibull

concepts.label: Zipf Distribution
concepts.definition: Power-law discrete distribution, models word frequencies

concepts.label: Zeta Distribution
concepts.definition: Discrete power-law P(k)=k^(−s)/ζ(s)

concepts.label: Categorical Distribution
concepts.definition: Single draw from k categories with given probabilities

concepts.label: Von Mises Distribution
concepts.definition: Circular/directional analog of normal distribution

concepts.label: Inverse Gaussian Distribution
concepts.definition: Models first passage time of Brownian motion

concepts.label: Lévy Distribution
concepts.definition: Stable distribution with heavy tail

concepts.label: Stable Distribution
concepts.definition: Distribution closed under convolution, generalization of normal

concepts.label: Erlang Distribution
concepts.definition: Gamma with integer shape parameter

concepts.label: Triangular Distribution
concepts.definition: Defined by min, max, and mode

concepts.label: Kumaraswamy Distribution
concepts.definition: Similar to Beta but with closed-form CDF

concepts.label: Nakagami Distribution
concepts.definition: Models fading in wireless channels

concepts.label: Rice Distribution
concepts.definition: Magnitude of complex Gaussian with non-zero mean

concepts.label: Z-Test
concepts.definition: Hypothesis test using normal distribution for known σ

concepts.label: One-Sample t-Test
concepts.definition: Tests if sample mean differs from hypothesized value

concepts.label: Two-Sample t-Test
concepts.definition: Tests if two sample means differ significantly

concepts.label: Paired t-Test
concepts.definition: Tests mean difference of paired observations

concepts.label: Welch's t-Test
concepts.definition: t-test not assuming equal variances

concepts.label: One-Way ANOVA
concepts.definition: Tests equality of means across multiple groups

concepts.label: Two-Way ANOVA
concepts.definition: ANOVA with two factors

concepts.label: MANOVA
concepts.definition: Multivariate ANOVA for multiple dependent variables

concepts.label: ANCOVA
concepts.definition: ANOVA controlling for covariates

concepts.label: Repeated Measures ANOVA
concepts.definition: ANOVA for within-subjects designs

concepts.label: Kruskal-Wallis Test
concepts.definition: Non-parametric alternative to one-way ANOVA

concepts.label: Friedman Test
concepts.definition: Non-parametric repeated measures ANOVA

concepts.label: Mann-Whitney U Test
concepts.definition: Non-parametric two-sample test for rank differences

concepts.label: Wilcoxon Signed-Rank Test
concepts.definition: Non-parametric paired test

concepts.label: Wilcoxon Rank-Sum Test
concepts.definition: Equivalent to Mann-Whitney U

concepts.label: Chi-Squared Test of Independence
concepts.definition: Tests association between categorical variables

concepts.label: Chi-Squared Goodness of Fit
concepts.definition: Tests if observed frequencies match expected

concepts.label: Fisher's Exact Test

concepts.definition: Tests paired nominal data on 2×2 table

concepts.label: Cochran's Q Test
concepts.definition: Extension of McNemar for multiple related groups

concepts.label: Kolmogorov-Smirnov Test
concepts.definition: Tests if sample follows a given distribution

concepts.definition: Goodness-of-fit test, more sensitive in tails than KS

concepts.label: Shapiro-Wilk Test
concepts.definition: Tests normality of sample

concepts.label: Lilliefors Test
concepts.definition: KS test for normality with estimated parameters

concepts.label: Jarque-Bera Test
concepts.definition: Tests normality using skewness and kurtosis

concepts.label: D'Agostino's K² Test
concepts.definition: Omnibus test for normality

concepts.label: Levene's Test
concepts.definition: Tests equality of variances across groups

concepts.label: Bartlett's Test
concepts.definition: Tests equality of variances assuming normality

concepts.label: Brown-Forsythe Test
concepts.definition: Modified Levene's test using median

concepts.label: F-Test
concepts.definition: Tests equality of two variances

concepts.label: Likelihood Ratio Test
concepts.definition: Compares fit of two nested models

concepts.label: Wald Test
concepts.definition: Tests significance of individual parameters

concepts.label: Score Test (Rao)

concepts.label: Durbin-Watson Test
concepts.definition: Tests for autocorrelation in regression residuals

concepts.label: Breusch-Pagan Test

concepts.label: White's Test
concepts.definition: General test for heteroscedasticity

concepts.label: Goldfeld-Quandt Test
concepts.definition: Tests for heteroscedasticity by splitting data

concepts.label: Augmented Dickey-Fuller Test
concepts.definition: Tests for unit root in time series

concepts.label: Phillips-Perron Test
concepts.definition: Non-parametric unit root test

concepts.label: KPSS Test
concepts.definition: Tests stationarity of time series

concepts.label: Granger Causality Test
concepts.definition: Tests if one time series predicts another

concepts.label: Ljung-Box Test
concepts.definition: Tests for autocorrelation in time series residuals

concepts.label: Runs Test
concepts.definition: Tests randomness of a sequence

concepts.label: Sign Test
concepts.definition: Non-parametric test for median

concepts.label: Binomial Test
concepts.definition: Tests if proportion differs from hypothesized value

concepts.label: Log-Rank Test
concepts.definition: Compares survival curves between groups

concepts.label: Breslow-Day Test
concepts.definition: Tests homogeneity of odds ratios

concepts.label: Hosmer-Lemeshow Test
concepts.definition: Goodness of fit for logistic regression

concepts.label: Pearson Correlation Test
concepts.definition: Tests significance of linear correlation

concepts.label: Spearman Rank Correlation Test
concepts.definition: Tests monotonic relationship

concepts.label: Kendall's Tau Test
concepts.definition: Non-parametric test of concordance

concepts.label: Point-Biserial Correlation
concepts.definition: Correlation between binary and continuous variable

concepts.label: Tukey's HSD Test
concepts.definition: Post-hoc pairwise comparison after ANOVA

concepts.label: Bonferroni Correction
concepts.definition: Adjusts significance level for multiple comparisons

concepts.label: Holm-Bonferroni Method
concepts.definition: Step-down procedure for multiple testing

concepts.label: Benjamini-Hochberg Procedure
concepts.definition: Controls false discovery rate

concepts.label: Dunnett's Test

concepts.definition: Conservative post-hoc test for all contrasts

concepts.label: Set
concepts.definition: Well-defined collection of distinct objects

concepts.label: Empty Set (∅)
concepts.definition: Set containing no elements

concepts.label: Subset (⊆)
concepts.definition: A⊆B if every element of A is in B

concepts.label: Proper Subset (⊂)
concepts.definition: A⊂B if A⊆B and A≠B

concepts.label: Power Set
concepts.definition: Set of all subsets of a set, |P(S)|=2^|S|

concepts.definition: A∩B = set of elements in both A and B

concepts.label: Complement
concepts.definition: Aᶜ = elements not in A

concepts.label: Set Difference (\)
concepts.definition: A\B = elements in A but not in B

concepts.label: Symmetric Difference (△)
concepts.definition: A△B = (A\B)∪(B\A)

concepts.label: Cartesian Product (×)
concepts.definition: A×B = set of all ordered pairs (a,b)

concepts.label: Cardinality
concepts.definition: Number of elements in a set

concepts.label: Countable Set
concepts.definition: Set with cardinality ≤ℵ₀

concepts.label: Uncountable Set
concepts.definition: Set with cardinality >ℵ₀

concepts.label: Aleph-Null (ℵ₀)
concepts.definition: Cardinality of the natural numbers

concepts.label: Continuum (c)
concepts.definition: Cardinality of the real numbers, c=2^ℵ₀

concepts.label: Axiom of Choice
concepts.definition: For any collection of non-empty sets, a choice function exists

concepts.label: Zorn's Lemma
concepts.definition: If every chain has upper bound, set has maximal element

concepts.label: Well-Ordering Theorem
concepts.definition: Every set can be well-ordered

concepts.label: Cantor's Theorem
concepts.definition: |P(S)|>|S| for any set S

concepts.label: Cantor's Diagonal Argument
concepts.definition: Proof that reals are uncountable

concepts.label: Continuum Hypothesis
concepts.definition: No set has cardinality between ℵ₀ and c

concepts.label: Zermelo-Fraenkel Axioms (ZF)
concepts.definition: Standard axioms for set theory

concepts.label: ZFC
concepts.definition: ZF + Axiom of Choice

concepts.label: Russell's Paradox
concepts.definition: Set of all sets not containing themselves leads to contradiction

concepts.label: De Morgan's Laws
concepts.definition: (A∪B)ᶜ=Aᶜ∩Bᶜ and (A∩B)ᶜ=Aᶜ∪Bᶜ

concepts.label: Venn Diagram
concepts.definition: Diagram showing relationships between sets

concepts.label: Equivalence Relation
concepts.definition: Reflexive, symmetric, transitive relation

concepts.label: Equivalence Class
concepts.definition: Subset of elements equivalent to each other

concepts.label: Partition
concepts.definition: Division of set into disjoint non-empty subsets

concepts.label: Bijection
concepts.definition: Function that is both injective and surjective

concepts.label: Injection
concepts.definition: One-to-one function

concepts.label: Surjection
concepts.definition: Onto function

concepts.label: Function
concepts.definition: Relation assigning each input exactly one output

concepts.label: Relation
concepts.definition: Subset of Cartesian product

concepts.label: Partial Order
concepts.definition: Reflexive, antisymmetric, transitive relation

concepts.label: Total Order
concepts.definition: Partial order where all elements are comparable

concepts.label: Well-Order
concepts.definition: Total order where every non-empty subset has a least element

concepts.label: Transfinite Induction
concepts.definition: Extension of mathematical induction to ordinals

concepts.label: Ordinal Arithmetic
concepts.definition: Addition, multiplication, exponentiation of ordinals

concepts.label: Cardinal Arithmetic
concepts.definition: Addition, multiplication, exponentiation of cardinals

concepts.label: Boolean Algebra
concepts.definition: Algebraic structure with ∧,∨,¬ satisfying Boolean axioms

concepts.label: Sigma-Algebra (σ-algebra)
concepts.definition: Collection of sets closed under complement and countable union

concepts.label: Filter
concepts.definition: Non-empty collection of sets closed under supersets and finite intersection

concepts.label: Ultrafilter
concepts.definition: Maximal filter

concepts.label: Graph
concepts.definition: Set of vertices connected by edges

concepts.label: Directed Graph (Digraph)
concepts.definition: Graph where edges have direction

concepts.label: Undirected Graph
concepts.definition: Graph where edges have no direction

concepts.label: Weighted Graph
concepts.definition: Graph where edges have numerical weights

concepts.label: Simple Graph
concepts.definition: Graph with no loops or multiple edges

concepts.label: Multigraph
concepts.definition: Graph allowing multiple edges between vertices

concepts.label: Complete Graph (Kₙ)
concepts.definition: Graph where every pair of vertices is connected

concepts.label: Bipartite Graph
concepts.definition: Graph whose vertices split into two independent sets

concepts.label: Complete Bipartite Graph (Kₘ,ₙ)
concepts.definition: Bipartite graph with all possible edges

concepts.label: Tree
concepts.definition: Connected acyclic graph

concepts.label: Forest
concepts.definition: Acyclic graph (disjoint union of trees)

concepts.label: Spanning Tree
concepts.definition: Subgraph that is a tree containing all vertices

concepts.label: Binary Tree
concepts.definition: Tree where each node has at most two children

concepts.label: Planar Graph
concepts.definition: Graph drawable in plane without edge crossings

concepts.label: Eulerian Path
concepts.definition: Path visiting every edge exactly once

concepts.label: Eulerian Circuit
concepts.definition: Closed Eulerian path

concepts.label: Hamiltonian Path
concepts.definition: Path visiting every vertex exactly once

concepts.label: Hamiltonian Cycle
concepts.definition: Closed Hamiltonian path

concepts.label: Chromatic Number
concepts.definition: Minimum colors needed to color vertices so no adjacent share color

concepts.label: Graph Coloring
concepts.definition: Assignment of colors to vertices with constraints

concepts.label: Four Color Theorem
concepts.definition: Every planar graph is 4-colorable

concepts.label: Vertex Degree
concepts.definition: Number of edges incident to a vertex

concepts.label: In-Degree
concepts.definition: Number of incoming edges in a digraph

concepts.label: Out-Degree
concepts.definition: Number of outgoing edges in a digraph

concepts.label: Adjacency Matrix

concepts.label: Incidence Matrix
concepts.definition: Matrix relating vertices to edges

concepts.label: Laplacian Matrix
concepts.definition: Degree matrix minus adjacency matrix

concepts.label: Connected Graph
concepts.definition: Graph where path exists between every pair of vertices

concepts.label: Strongly Connected
concepts.definition: Digraph where directed path exists between every pair

concepts.label: Connected Component
concepts.definition: Maximal connected subgraph

concepts.label: Cut Vertex
concepts.definition: Vertex whose removal disconnects graph

concepts.label: Bridge
concepts.definition: Edge whose removal disconnects graph

concepts.label: Clique
concepts.definition: Complete subgraph

concepts.label: Independent Set
concepts.definition: Set of vertices with no edges between them

concepts.label: Vertex Cover
concepts.definition: Set of vertices touching all edges

concepts.label: Matching
concepts.definition: Set of edges with no shared vertices

concepts.label: Maximum Matching
concepts.definition: Matching with maximum number of edges

concepts.label: Perfect Matching
concepts.definition: Matching covering all vertices

concepts.label: Network Flow
concepts.definition: Assignment of flow to edges respecting capacity constraints

concepts.label: Max-Flow Min-Cut Theorem
concepts.definition: Maximum flow equals minimum cut capacity

concepts.label: Shortest Path

concepts.label: Dijkstra's Algorithm
concepts.definition: Finds shortest paths from source in non-negative weighted graph

concepts.label: Bellman-Ford Algorithm
concepts.definition: Shortest paths allowing negative weights

concepts.label: Floyd-Warshall Algorithm
concepts.definition: All-pairs shortest paths

concepts.label: Kruskal's Algorithm
concepts.definition: Minimum spanning tree by adding cheapest edges

concepts.label: Prim's Algorithm
concepts.definition: Minimum spanning tree by growing from a vertex

concepts.label: Depth-First Search

concepts.label: Breadth-First Search
concepts.definition: Graph traversal exploring neighbors first

concepts.label: Topological Sort

concepts.label: Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG)

concepts.label: Kuratowski's Theorem

concepts.definition: Order must appear in large enough structures

concepts.label: Ramsey Number

concepts.label: Petersen Graph

concepts.label: Hypergraph

concepts.definition: Structure-preserving bijection between graphs

concepts.label: Graph Minor
concepts.definition: Graph obtained by contracting edges and deleting vertices/edges

concepts.label: Treewidth
concepts.definition: Measure of how tree-like a graph is

concepts.label: Open Set
concepts.definition: Set in the topology of a topological space

concepts.label: Closed Set
concepts.definition: Complement of an open set

concepts.label: Closure
concepts.definition: Smallest closed set containing a given set

concepts.label: Interior
concepts.definition: Largest open set contained in a given set

concepts.label: Boundary
concepts.definition: Points in closure but not interior

concepts.label: Compact Space
concepts.definition: Every open cover has a finite subcover

concepts.label: Connected Space
concepts.definition: Cannot be partitioned into two non-empty open sets

concepts.label: Path-Connected Space
concepts.definition: Any two points connected by a continuous path

concepts.label: Simply Connected Space
concepts.definition: Path-connected with trivial fundamental group

concepts.label: Hausdorff Space
concepts.definition: Distinct points have disjoint neighborhoods

concepts.label: Metric Space
concepts.definition: Set with distance function satisfying metric axioms

concepts.label: Homeomorphism
concepts.definition: Continuous bijection with continuous inverse

concepts.label: Homotopy
concepts.definition: Continuous deformation of one map into another

concepts.label: Fundamental Group
concepts.definition: Group of loops up to homotopy, π₁(X)

concepts.label: Homology
concepts.definition: Algebraic invariants measuring holes in spaces

concepts.label: Cohomology
concepts.definition: Dual of homology, assigns algebraic invariants to spaces

concepts.label: Euler Characteristic
concepts.definition: χ=V−E+F, topological invariant

concepts.definition: Bounds positive/negative real roots by sign changes

concepts.definition: Determines stability of polynomial from coefficients

concepts.label: Sturm's Theorem

concepts.definition: Series convergence by comparing with known series

concepts.definition: Alternating series with decreasing terms converges

concepts.label: Abel's Summation
concepts.definition: Discrete analog of integration by parts for series

concepts.label: Cesàro Summation

concepts.label: Borel Summation
concepts.definition: Assigns values to divergent series via Laplace-like transform

concepts.label: Euler-Maclaurin Formula
concepts.definition: Relates sums to integrals with Bernoulli number corrections

concepts.label: Stirling's Approximation
concepts.definition: n!≈√(2πn)(n/e)ⁿ for large n

concepts.definition: Σ1/n²=π²/6, solved by Euler

concepts.label: Gregory-Leibniz Series
concepts.definition: Arctan(1)=π/4 via alternating series

concepts.label: Machin's Formula
concepts.definition: π/4=4arctan(1/5)−arctan(1/239)

concepts.label: Ramanujan's Pi Formulas
concepts.definition: Rapidly converging series for 1/π

concepts.label: Chudnovsky Algorithm
concepts.definition: Fast algorithm for computing digits of π

concepts.label: Hermite-Lindemann Theorem

concepts.label: Baker's Theorem
concepts.definition: Linear forms in logarithms of algebraic numbers

concepts.label: Thue-Siegel-Roth Theorem

concepts.label: Schmidt's Subspace Theorem
concepts.definition: Generalization of Roth's theorem to higher dimensions

concepts.label: Jacobi Symbol

concepts.label: Möbius Inversion

concepts.label: Mertens' Theorems
concepts.definition: Asymptotic results about sums over primes

concepts.label: Selberg Sieve

concepts.label: Large Sieve Inequality

concepts.definition: Technique for additive number theory problems

concepts.label: Chen's Theorem

concepts.definition: Number of prime factors of n is approximately normally distributed

concepts.definition: Normal order of ω(n) is log log n

concepts.label: Brun's Theorem

concepts.label: Zhang's Theorem

concepts.label: Polymath 8

concepts.label: Goldston-Pintz-Yıldırım

concepts.label: Ingham's Theorem

concepts.label: De la Vallée-Poussin's Theorem

concepts.label: Selberg's Symmetry Formula

concepts.label: Oppermann's Conjecture

concepts.label: Andrica's Conjecture
concepts.definition: √pₙ₊₁−√pₙ<1 for all n

concepts.label: Cramér-Granville Conjecture

concepts.label: Variance

concepts.label: Moment Generating Function

concepts.label: Cumulant
concepts.definition: Coefficients in log of moment generating function

concepts.label: Skewness

concepts.label: Kurtosis
concepts.definition: Fourth standardized moment, measures tail heaviness

concepts.label: Median
concepts.definition: Middle value of ordered data

concepts.label: Mode
concepts.definition: Most frequent value in dataset

concepts.label: Quantile
concepts.definition: Value below which given fraction of data falls

concepts.label: Percentile
concepts.definition: Value below which given percentage falls

concepts.label: Interquartile Range

concepts.label: Confidence Interval

concepts.label: P-Value

concepts.label: Type II Error
concepts.definition: Failing to reject false null hypothesis (false negative)

concepts.label: Relative Risk
concepts.definition: Ratio of probabilities of event in two groups

concepts.definition: Estimating parameters by maximizing likelihood

concepts.definition: Updating probability estimates using Bayes' theorem

concepts.definition: Updated belief after observing data

concepts.label: Conjugate Prior
concepts.definition: Prior that yields posterior in same family

concepts.label: Lasso Regression

concepts.definition: Statistical method modeling observed variables as linear combinations

concepts.label: Cluster Analysis
concepts.definition: Grouping objects by similarity

concepts.label: Hierarchical Clustering

concepts.definition: Modeling relationship y=β₀+β₁x+ε

concepts.label: Multiple Regression

concepts.label: Logistic Regression

concepts.label: Poisson Regression

concepts.label: Mixed Effects Model

concepts.label: Spectral Density

concepts.label: Ancillary Statistic

concepts.label: Markov Chain

concepts.label: Brownian Motion

concepts.label: Martingale

concepts.label: Random Walk

concepts.label: Birth-Death Process

concepts.label: Queueing Theory

concepts.label: Copula

concepts.label: Fisher Information

concepts.label: Wasserstein Distance
concepts.definition: Earth mover's distance between distributions

concepts.label: Convex Polygon

concepts.label: Concave Polygon

concepts.label: Quadrilateral

concepts.label: Right Angle

concepts.label: Acute Angle
concepts.definition: Angle less than 90°

concepts.label: Obtuse Angle
concepts.definition: Angle between 90° and 180°

concepts.label: Straight Angle
concepts.definition: 180° angle

concepts.label: Reflex Angle
concepts.definition: Angle between 180° and 360°

concepts.label: Complementary Angles
concepts.definition: Two angles summing to 90°

concepts.label: Supplementary Angles
concepts.definition: Two angles summing to 180°

concepts.label: Similarity

concepts.label: Symmetry
concepts.definition: Invariance under transformation

concepts.label: Reflection Symmetry
concepts.definition: Invariance under reflection across a line

concepts.label: Rotational Symmetry
concepts.definition: Invariance under rotation by certain angles

concepts.label: Translation

concepts.label: Rotation
concepts.definition: Rigid motion turning around a fixed point

concepts.label: Reflection
concepts.definition: Rigid motion flipping across a line

concepts.label: Dilation

concepts.label: Tessellation
concepts.definition: Tiling of plane with shapes without gaps or overlaps

concepts.label: Polyhedron
concepts.definition: 3D solid with flat polygonal faces

concepts.label: Platonic Solid

concepts.label: Archimedean Solid
concepts.definition: Semi-regular convex polyhedron with regular faces of 2+ types

concepts.label: Catalan Solid
concepts.definition: Dual of an Archimedean solid

concepts.label: Johnson Solid
concepts.definition: Non-uniform convex polyhedron with regular faces

concepts.definition: Curve from intersection of plane and cone

concepts.label: Focus (Geometry)
concepts.definition: Special point defining a conic section

concepts.label: Directrix
concepts.definition: Line associated with conic section definition

concepts.label: Eccentricity
concepts.definition: Ratio determining shape of conic section

concepts.label: Asymptote
concepts.definition: Line a curve approaches but never touches

concepts.label: Tangent Line
concepts.definition: Line touching curve at exactly one point

concepts.label: Normal Line
concepts.definition: Line perpendicular to tangent at point of tangency

concepts.label: Chord
concepts.definition: Line segment with endpoints on a curve

concepts.label: Diameter
concepts.definition: Chord passing through center of circle

concepts.label: Radius
concepts.definition: Distance from center to circumference of circle

concepts.label: Circumference
concepts.definition: Perimeter of a circle, C=2πr

concepts.label: Area
concepts.definition: Measure of 2D region enclosed by shape

concepts.label: Volume
concepts.definition: Measure of 3D region enclosed by solid

concepts.label: Surface Area
concepts.definition: Total area of surface of 3D object

concepts.label: Perimeter
concepts.definition: Total length of boundary of 2D shape

concepts.label: Centroid
concepts.definition: Center of mass of a geometric figure

concepts.label: Incircle
concepts.definition: Largest circle inscribed in a polygon

concepts.label: Circumscribed Circle
concepts.definition: Smallest circle containing a polygon

concepts.label: Euler Line
concepts.definition: Line through orthocenter, centroid, circumcenter of triangle

concepts.label: Nine-Point Circle

concepts.label: Steiner Ellipse
concepts.definition: Ellipse inscribed in triangle tangent to midpoints

concepts.label: Cross-Ratio
concepts.definition: Projective invariant of four collinear points

concepts.label: Homogeneous Coordinates
concepts.definition: Coordinate system for projective geometry

concepts.label: Barycentric Coordinates
concepts.definition: Coordinates relative to triangle vertices

concepts.label: Trilinear Coordinates
concepts.definition: Coordinates relative to triangle sides

concepts.label: Inversion (Geometry)
concepts.definition: Transformation mapping point P to P' with OP·OP'=r²

concepts.label: Stereographic Projection
concepts.definition: Projection of sphere onto plane from a pole

concepts.label: Mercator Projection
concepts.definition: Conformal cylindrical map projection

concepts.label: Voronoi Diagram
concepts.definition: Partition of plane into regions closest to given points

concepts.label: Delaunay Triangulation
concepts.definition: Dual of Voronoi diagram, maximizes minimum angle

concepts.label: Convex Hull
concepts.definition: Smallest convex set containing given points

concepts.label: Pick's Theorem
concepts.definition: A=I+B/2−1 for area of lattice polygon

concepts.label: Heron's Formula

concepts.label: Brahmagupta's Formula
concepts.definition: Area of cyclic quadrilateral

concepts.label: Shoelace Formula
concepts.definition: Polygon area from vertex coordinates

concepts.label: Stewart's Theorem
concepts.definition: Relates cevian length to side lengths of triangle

concepts.label: Menelaus' Theorem
concepts.definition: Collinearity condition for points on triangle sides

concepts.label: Ceva's Theorem
concepts.definition: Concurrency condition for cevians in triangle

concepts.label: Ptolemy's Theorem
concepts.definition: Product of diagonals = sum of products of opposite sides in cyclic quadrilateral

concepts.label: Simson Line
concepts.definition: Collinear feet of perpendiculars from point on circumcircle

concepts.label: Power of a Point

concepts.label: Radical Axis
concepts.definition: Locus of equal power with respect to two circles

concepts.label: Apollonius Circle
concepts.definition: Locus of points with constant ratio of distances to two points

concepts.label: Pappus's Theorem
concepts.definition: Surface area and volume of revolution

concepts.label: Cavalieri's Principle
concepts.definition: Solids with equal cross-sections at every height have equal volume

concepts.label: Prismatoid
concepts.definition: Polyhedron with all vertices in two parallel planes

concepts.label: Antiprism
concepts.definition: Polyhedron with two parallel polygonal faces connected by triangles

concepts.label: Analytic Function

concepts.label: Meromorphic Function
concepts.definition: Analytic except at isolated poles

concepts.label: Entire Function
concepts.definition: Analytic on all of ℂ

concepts.label: Holomorphic Function
concepts.definition: Complex differentiable function

concepts.label: Harmonic Function
concepts.definition: Function satisfying Laplace's equation ∇²f=0

concepts.label: Subharmonic Function
concepts.definition: Function satisfying ∇²f≥0

concepts.label: Conformal Map

concepts.label: Riemann Surface
concepts.definition: One-dimensional complex manifold

concepts.label: Analytic Continuation
concepts.definition: Extension of analytic function beyond original domain

concepts.label: Monodromy
concepts.definition: Effect of analytic continuation around loops

concepts.label: Branch Point
concepts.definition: Point where multi-valued function changes branch

concepts.label: Branch Cut
concepts.definition: Curve making multi-valued function single-valued

concepts.label: Contour Integration
concepts.definition: Integration along path in complex plane

concepts.label: Winding Number
concepts.definition: Number of times curve winds around point

concepts.label: Pole (Complex Analysis)
concepts.definition: Isolated singularity where function goes to ∞

concepts.label: Essential Singularity
concepts.definition: Singularity that is neither removable nor a pole

concepts.label: Removable Singularity
concepts.definition: Singularity where function can be defined to be analytic

concepts.label: Residue
concepts.definition: Coefficient a₋₁ in Laurent expansion, key to residue theorem

concepts.label: Weierstrass M-Test
concepts.definition: Sufficient condition for uniform convergence of series

concepts.label: Abel's Limit Theorem
concepts.definition: Relates convergence of power series at boundary

concepts.label: Phragmén-Lindelöf Theorem
concepts.definition: Maximum principle for unbounded domains

concepts.label: Hadamard Factorization
concepts.definition: Entire function as product over its zeros

concepts.label: Jensen's Formula
concepts.definition: Relates integral of log|f| to zeros

concepts.label: Nevanlinna Theory
concepts.definition: Value distribution theory for meromorphic functions

concepts.label: Normal Family
concepts.definition: Family where every sequence has locally uniformly convergent subsequence

concepts.label: Arithmetic Function
concepts.definition: Function defined on positive integers

concepts.label: Completely Multiplicative

concepts.label: Number of Divisors τ(n)
concepts.definition: Count of divisors of n

concepts.label: Liouville's Function λ(n)
concepts.definition: (-1)^Ω(n) where Ω counts prime factors with multiplicity

concepts.definition: log p if n=p^k, else 0

concepts.label: Chebyshev Functions

concepts.label: Sieve of Eratosthenes
concepts.definition: Algorithm finding all primes up to n

concepts.label: Axiom
concepts.definition: Statement accepted as true without proof as basis for reasoning

concepts.label: Theorem
concepts.definition: Statement proven true from axioms and previously proven statements

concepts.label: Lemma
concepts.definition: Auxiliary theorem used in proving a larger result

concepts.label: Corollary
concepts.definition: Statement following directly from a theorem

concepts.label: Conjecture
concepts.definition: Unproven statement believed to be true

concepts.label: Proof
concepts.definition: Logical argument establishing truth of a statement

concepts.label: Proof by Contradiction
concepts.definition: Assuming negation leads to contradiction

concepts.label: Proof by Induction
concepts.definition: Base case + inductive step proves for all natural numbers

concepts.label: Strong Induction
concepts.definition: Induction assuming truth for all values less than n

concepts.label: Constructive Proof
concepts.definition: Proof that explicitly constructs the object

concepts.label: Non-Constructive Proof
concepts.definition: Proof showing existence without construction

concepts.label: Counterexample
concepts.definition: Example disproving a statement

concepts.label: Well-Ordering Principle
concepts.definition: Every non-empty set of natural numbers has least element

concepts.label: Mathematical Induction
concepts.definition: Proof technique for natural number statements

concepts.label: Algorithm
concepts.definition: Finite sequence of well-defined instructions

concepts.label: Heuristic
concepts.definition: Problem-solving approach that is not guaranteed to be optimal

concepts.label: Isometry
concepts.definition: Distance-preserving map between metric spaces

concepts.label: Fixed Point
concepts.definition: Point mapped to itself by a function

concepts.label: Contraction Mapping
concepts.definition: Map reducing distance between points

concepts.label: Dense Set

concepts.label: Nowhere Dense Set
concepts.definition: Set whose closure has empty interior

concepts.label: Separable Space

concepts.label: Paracompact Space

concepts.label: Normal Space
concepts.definition: Disjoint closed sets can be separated by open sets

concepts.label: Regular Space
concepts.definition: Point and closed set can be separated by open sets

concepts.label: Metrizable Space
concepts.definition: Topological space whose topology comes from a metric

concepts.label: Polish Space
concepts.definition: Separable completely metrizable topological space

concepts.label: Cantor Set
concepts.definition: Closed set formed by repeatedly removing middle thirds
